Person 1 has reviewed the following movies:

- Benny & Joon (1993) (Comedy|Romance): Rated 4.0/5
- Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventure (1989) (Adventure|Comedy|Sci-Fi): Rated 2.0/5
- Singin' in the Rain (1952) (Comedy|Musical|Romance): Rated 5.0/5
- 10 Things I Hate About You (1999) (Comedy|Romance): Rated 4.5/5
- League of Their Own, A (1992) (Comedy|Drama): Rated 3.0/5

Consider these two movies they have not seen:

- Movie A: Field of Dreams (1989) (Children|Drama|Fantasy), average rating 3.67/5 (452 ratings)
- Movie B: 1408 (2007) (Drama|Horror|Thriller), average rating 3.38/5 (195 ratings)

A decision tree trained on this dataset finds that when the two movies' average ratings differ by 0.15 to 0.30, users prefer the higher-rated movie 61% of the time.

TASK: Predict which movie Person 1 would rate higher. Explain your reasoning in 1 sentence. Then conclude with exactly 'PREDICTION: 1' (Movie A) or 'PREDICTION: 0' (Movie B).

Person 1 has reviewed the following movies:

- Good Morning, Vietnam (1987) (Comedy|Drama|War): Rated 5.0/5
- Shawshank Redemption, The (1994) (Crime|Drama): Rated 4.0/5
- Men in Black (a.k.a. MIB) (1997) (Action|Comedy|Sci-Fi): Rated 4.5/5
- Green Mile, The (1999) (Crime|Drama): Rated 4.5/5
- Bonnie and Clyde (1967) (Crime|Drama): Rated 4.5/5

Consider these two movies they have not seen:

- Movie A: Beetlejuice (1988) (Comedy|Fantasy), average rating 3.54/5 (749 ratings)
- Movie B: Sum of All Fears, The (2002) (Drama|Thriller), average rating 3.24/5 (168 ratings)

A decision tree trained on this dataset finds that when the two movies' average ratings differ by 0.15 to 0.30, users prefer the higher-rated movie 61% of the time.

TASK: Predict which movie Person 1 would rate higher. Explain your reasoning in 1 sentence. Then conclude with exactly 'PREDICTION: 1' (Movie A) or 'PREDICTION: 0' (Movie B).

PREDICTION: 1
